message:
fix(core,search,server): use f64::total_cmp, fix query sanitization, remove harmful HTML sanitizer

Float comparison fixes:
- Replace unsafe partial_cmp().unwrap_or() with f64::total_cmp() across conformal,
  search_service, search_two_tier, hybrid_candidates, and tools modules
- Add secondary sort stability by slug/human_key in project suggestions

Search improvements:
- Strip all trailing wildcards (not just one) to handle "foo * *" → "foo"
- Fix ScoredEntry Ord impl for correct descending sort by idx
- Make is_operators_only() test-only, move check after wildcard stripping

Markdown sanitizer removal:
- Remove ammonia HTML sanitizer from tui_markdown - it destroys valid Markdown
  like Rust generics <T> and cannot sanitize Markdown link syntax
- Terminal rendering doesn't evaluate script tags; ftui handles OSC 8 sanitization

Minor guard module formatting cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
